name: cordys-crm
description: Cordys CRM L2C full-pipeline AI assistant — role-aware, pipeline-native, cross-module linkage tracking, funnel analysis, and workflow automation

profession.zh: Cordys CRM L2C 管道专家

displayDescription.en: Role-aware CRM assistant for the full Lead-to-Cash pipeline. Auto-detects user role and provides adaptive queries, risk alerts, funnel analysis, and workflow guidance.
displayDescription.zh: 角色感知型CRM助手，覆盖线索到现金全链路。自动识别角色，提供查询、风险预警与漏斗分析。
